new_value: Integrated persist_ssn call on success path after option build with proper NVM error branching to nvm_failed label and common_wipe for sensitive data (nonce, piv, plaintext, seq). All error paths now ensure wipe before return. Updated oscore.h docs with security details and nvm_failed behavior. Test in test_nvm_protect_request_failure passes verifying SSN increment kept and no 'not initialized' error on retry. Verified with oscore test vectors.
